description:
This is a keystroke launcher for Windows and macOS.


New Features:
- Added new option to hide tray icon
- Simple File Search extension: added option to exclude hidden files
- Added option to clear user input after invoking action
- Workflow extension: added option to require user confirmation before invocation
- Added French translations (Thanks @Cleboost)
Improvements:
- Moved "Excluded items" to separate settings page
  -Simple File Search extension: improved settings UI
Bug fixes:
- Fixed a bug that caused translations not to fall back to en-US when translation is not available in user language
